nasb.text: Then he waited yet another seven days, and sent out the dove; but she did not return to him again.

esv.text: Then he waited another seven days and sent forth the dove, and she did not return to him anymore.

cnv.text: 挪亞再等了七天，又把鴿子放出去，鴿子就再沒有回到他那裡。

ccb.text: 等了七天，他又放出鸽子，这一次，鸽子没有回来。

csbs.text: 他另外又等了七天，又把鸽子放出去，鸽子就再也没有回到他那里了。
